sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82023" key="periptw/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιπτώσσω</orth>, <sense id="n82023.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fear greatly</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τι</itype> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0576.tlg001:206" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Musae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">206</biblScope> </bibl> (dub.): abs., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.110</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
